title: tetragonocalamus quadrangularis
intro: Tetragonocalamus quadrangularis, also known as the bamboo grass, is a type of bamboo species native to China. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetragonocalamus quadrangularis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
